slots.meaning: The unnamed second-person protagonist's role/identity.
slots.guidance: A single solitary traveler undertaking a perilous crossing on foot; capable but not reckless; second person keeps them unnamed.

slots.meaning: The physical sanctuary the hero is crossing the gauntlet to reach.
slots.guidance: A single named destination structure; a place of safety and completion at journey's end, not itself dangerous.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, lethal place the gauntlet happens inside.
slots.guidance: A single named road/wilderness crossing of sequential hazards; wonder-and-dread, no toxic/unbreathable air as a scripted hazard.

slots.meaning: The single point of no return where the hero leaves safety and the crossing begins.
slots.guidance: A transitional marker/edge of civilization behind which there is no way back; the one-way threshold into the gauntlet.

slots.meaning: The named hazard/checkpoint the hero must cross at station 1 of 24.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative hazard name (a proper-noun-style checkpoint title) establishing this station's danger before its mechanism is explained.
